title: io.containers.autoupdate.authfile not working with podman create
body:
### Issue Description

Creating a container with label ```io.containers.autoupdate.authfile``` is not working. If I change the label to ```authfile``` it works as expected.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Run the command:

```bash
podman create --name somename \
--label "io.containers.autoupdate.authfile=/path/to/auth.json" \
--label "io.containers.autoupdate=registry" \
ghcr.io/user/container:latest
```


### Describe the results you received

I get the following error:

>Error: initializing source docker://ghcr.io/user/container:latest: unable to retrieve auth token: invalid username/password: unauthorized

### Describe the results you expected

Describe the results you expected

A successfull pull of ```ghcr.io/user/container:latest```

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: The `io.containers.autoupdate.authfile` annotation is used for `podman auto-update` not for an initial pull via `podman create`, you need to run `podman create --authfile ...` to set the authfile for create.
